---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] <Feature request title here>"
labels: feature request
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] OR This idea would fix Bug report XY.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**(Optional) Discuss possible technical implementation**
If you know your way around code, also feel free to give a first suggestion on how to implement your feature request.
